name: NIST Cybersecurity Framework
description: Project-authored reference index for organizing cybersecurity governance evidence.
source_note: Identifiers and short summaries reference NIST CSF 2.0; consult the official NIST publication.
controls: Set direction and oversight for cybersecurity risk.
Understand assets, context, and cybersecurity risk.
Use safeguards to reduce cybersecurity risk.
Evaluate threats, weaknesses, likelihood, and impact.
Manage identity and authorized access safeguards.
Protect data according to risk and handling needs.
